welcome.title: Welcome, {name}
welcome.subtitle: This is your dashboard for today.

descriptions.student: These are the last forms you submitted.
descriptions.teacher: These are the last forms submitted by your students.
descriptions.conservatorium_admin: These are the last forms submitted in your conservatory.
descriptions.site_admin: These are all the last forms submitted in the system.
descriptions.ministry_director: These are all the last forms approved and pending review.
descriptions.parent: These are the last forms submitted for your children.
descriptions.default: Below are the latest form submissions.

makeups.title: Makeup Lessons
makeups.subtitle: Here you can see your makeup lesson balance and book a new lesson.

balanceCard.title: Makeup Lesson Balance
balanceCard.description: Available credits for makeup lessons due to teacher/system cancellations or your cancellations according to policy.

bookCard.title: Book a Makeup Lesson
bookCard.description: Use your credits to schedule a new lesson at a time that suits you.

details.title: Credit Details
details.empty: No credits available at the moment.

PendingApproval.title: Account Pending Approval
PendingApproval.description: Your registration has been successfully received! The conservatory team is currently reviewing your details.

steps.title: What happens next?
steps.review: The administration team is reviewing your registration form.
steps.contact: If necessary, we will contact you for additional information.
steps.notify: You will receive a confirmation message as soon as your account is activated and you can access the dashboard.

PendingApproval.support: Need help? Contact the office by phone or email.

Teacher.welcomeSubtitle: Here is your overview for today
Teacher.pendingApprovalsDesc: Forms and requests needing your attention
Teacher.myStudentsDesc: Quick overview of all your students

MessagesPage.title: Messages
MessagesPage.subtitle: Communicate with students, parents, and teachers.

Reports.creditsIssuedDesc: Credits issued to students this month.
Reports.trialConversionDesc: 21 out of 31 trial students enrolled this month (mock data).
Reports.makeupCreditsContext: From all credits created due to teacher/system cancellations.
Reports.practiceEngagementDesc: Percentage of students who logged practice last week.
Reports.avgMinutesByInstrument: Avg Monthly Practice Minutes by Instrument
Reports.lowEngagementDesc: Students with the least total practice time.
Reports.teacherPerformanceDesc: General overview of teacher activity this month.
Reports.roomOccupancyDesc: Hourly occupancy of all rooms throughout the week. Darker colors indicate higher occupancy.

AlumniPage.title: Alumni Network
AlumniPage.subtitle: Reconnect with friends, teachers, and the conservatory.
AlumniPage.directorySubtitle: Find and connect with fellow graduates.
AlumniPage.masterclassesSubtitle: Hone your skills and learn from the best in the field.

form.name: Full Name
form.avatarDescription: Links to an image file (e.g., https://...)

PricingPage.title: Pricing Settings
PricingPage.subtitle: Manage lesson rates, discounts, and premiums for your conservatorium.

Auth.cardDescription: Sign in to your account to continue

toasts.pendingAccountDesc: Your account has not yet been approved by the conservatory admin.
toasts.loginFailedDesc: No user found with the provided email.
toasts.magicLinkSentDesc: Check your inbox for the login link.

Auth.oauthComingSoonDesc: Google/Microsoft login is not yet available.
Auth.demoModeNotice: Demo mode: Any email from the mock list logs in. No password is checked.

ScholarshipApplication.successToastDesc: Your scholarship application has been received and will be reviewed by the committee. A response will be provided within 30 business days.
ScholarshipApplication.requestReceivedDesc: The committee's response will be sent to you soon. Meanwhile, the application status has been updated in your dashboard.
ScholarshipApplication.pageDesc: The Harmonia Scholarship Fund assists outstanding students or families with limited means to fulfill their musical dream.
ScholarshipApplication.applicationReason: Reason for Scholarship Application (Up to 300 words)
ScholarshipApplication.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why you need the scholarship, musical achievements, or any relevant information for the committee...
ScholarshipApplication.attentionDesc: Attaching the 3 most recent pay slips of both spouses (or a National Insurance certificate) significantly increases the information available to the committee in evaluating the application.
ScholarshipApplication.uploadFiles: Click to upload files or drag here

UserManagement.title: User Management
UserManagement.subtitle: Manage students, teachers, parents, and admins
UserManagement.manageUsers: Manage users, permissions, and join requests.
UserManagement.pendingRequestsDesc: Approve or reject requests from new users to join your conservatory.
UserManagement.rejectUserDesc: Are you sure you want to reject this join request? You can provide a reason (optional).
UserManagement.noPermissionEdit: You do not have permission to edit this user.
UserManagement.noUsersFoundContent: No users found matching the search.
UserManagement.name: Name

validation.nameMin: Full name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.yearsPositive: Years must be a positive number.

UserManagement.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this user?

InstrumentRental.title: Instrument Rental
InstrumentRental.subtitle: Manage instrument rentals for students
InstrumentRental.rentDesc: Fill in the rental details and have the parent/student sign for the instrument.
InstrumentRental.parentSignatureLabel: Parent signature confirming the charter and deposit terms
InstrumentRental.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this instrument?
InstrumentRental.noRentedInstruments: No instruments are currently rented out.

AgeUpgradeModal.title: {name} is celebrating 13!
AgeUpgradeModal.description: You can now invite {name} to manage their Harmonia account independently.
AgeUpgradeModal.step1Desc: They will be able to see the schedule, log practice, and communicate with the teacher. You will continue to manage billing and payments.
AgeUpgradeModal.manageMyselfBtn: I'll manage for them for now
AgeUpgradeModal.toastDesc: {name} will soon receive an email invitation to join the system.
AgeUpgradeModal.subtitle: חשבונך עובר לניהול עצמאי

AvailabilityGrid.title: Weekly Availability Template
AvailabilityGrid.subtitle: Set your teaching hours
AvailabilityGrid.description: Click on time slots to mark them as available. These are the hours that will be presented to students for booking lessons.
AvailabilityGrid.syncDesc: Connect your Google or Apple calendar to automatically block times you are unavailable, and display Harmonia lessons in your personal calendar.

Walkthrough.title: System Tour
Walkthrough.studentProfileDesc: Here you will find a summary of your activity, progress, and achievements.
Walkthrough.scheduleDesc: Here you can see your schedule, cancel or reschedule a lesson.
Walkthrough.practiceDesc: Update your teacher on your progress between lessons and log your practices.
Walkthrough.formsDesc: Submit forms for recitals, exams, and more, and track their approval status.
Walkthrough.messagesDesc: Send messages directly to your teacher from here.
Walkthrough.studentHelpDesc: For any question - click the help button! Our AI assistant is available 24/7.
Walkthrough.familyHubDesc: This is your control center - here you will see all your children in one place.
Walkthrough.childCardDesc: Here is a weekly summary of your child's activity. Click on 'Full Profile' to see all details.
Walkthrough.billingDesc: Here you will find invoices and can update payment methods.
Walkthrough.notificationsDesc: Choose how to receive updates - SMS, WhatsApp, or Email.
Walkthrough.weeklySummaryDesc: Additionally, every week you will receive an email summary of what happened in your children's lessons.
Walkthrough.parentHelpDesc: Have questions? Click on help at any time.
Walkthrough.teacherDashboardDesc: Welcome! This is your control center, with all the information you need for today.
Walkthrough.todayLessonsDesc: Here you can mark attendance for your students with a click.
Walkthrough.availabilityDesc: Set when you are available - students will see your availability and can book lessons.
Walkthrough.studentRosterDesc: View all your students and quickly access their full profile.
Walkthrough.teacherApprovalsDesc: Here forms submitted by students waiting for your approval will wait for you.
Walkthrough.sickLeaveDesc: If you are sick, click here - the system will cancel the lessons and notify everyone automatically.
Walkthrough.teacherHelpDesc: This tour is available again from settings. For more questions, use the AI assistant.
Walkthrough.adminDashboardDesc: Welcome! This is your control center for managing the conservatorium.
Walkthrough.keyMetricsDesc: Here you will see the most important data in real-time: active students, lessons, pending approvals, and AI alerts.
Walkthrough.aiAlertsDesc: The AI agent proactively identifies operational issues and alerts you here.
Walkthrough.userManagementDesc: Here you can approve join requests and manage all users.
Walkthrough.adminApprovalsDesc: Forms of all types awaiting your final approval are centralized here.
Walkthrough.masterScheduleDesc: View the schedule of all teachers and rooms at a glance.
Walkthrough.reportsDesc: Analyze the institution's performance with financial, operational, and academic reports.
Walkthrough.settingsDesc: From here you can manage all system settings, including pricing, AI agents, and more.

SlotPromotionCard.shareText: I found an available {instrument} lesson with {teacher} at a special price of ₪{price}!
SlotPromotionCard.linkCopiedDesc: You can now share it with friends.

PerformanceBooking.musiciansAssignedDesc: {count} musicians have been assigned to the event.
PerformanceBooking.quoteSentDesc: The quote for "{eventName}" has been sent to the client.
PerformanceBooking.depositUpdatedDesc: The booking for "{eventName}" has been updated.
PerformanceBooking.bookingConfirmedDesc: The booking for "{eventName}" is fully confirmed.
PerformanceBooking.dialogAssignDesc: Select the musicians performing at the event: {eventName}
PerformanceBooking.dialogSendQuoteDesc: Send an official quote for the event: {eventName}
PerformanceBooking.dialogPersonalMsgPlaceholder: e.g., The quote includes basic amplification. We look forward to serving you...

TeacherReports.practiceEngagementDesc: Students who logged practice this month
TeacherReports.barChartDesc: Total logged practice minutes per student.
TeacherReports.upcomingExamsDesc: Overview of submission statuses for your students.
TeacherReports.noUpcomingExams: No exam submissions in the near future.

PerformanceProfileEditor.profileUpdated: Your performance profile has been updated!
PerformanceProfileEditor.optInDesc: Allow event managers to find and book you for performances through the platform.
PerformanceProfileEditor.publicProfileDesc: These details will be shown to potential event managers.
PerformanceProfileEditor.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Concert Violinist and Chamber Musician
PerformanceProfileEditor.bioPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself as a performer, your styles, and your stage experience.
PerformanceProfileEditor.soloToggle: Available to perform as a soloist
PerformanceProfileEditor.chamberToggle: Available to perform in a chamber ensemble
PerformanceProfileEditor.mediaDesc: Add links to YouTube or Vimeo videos showcasing your performances.

ParentNotificationPanel.panelDesc: Choose how we update you regarding attendance, payments, and conservatorium events.
ParentNotificationPanel.quietHoursDesc: Pause non-urgent SMS messages (excluding attendance) outside active hours.

RoomManagementDialog.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this room?
RoomManagementDialog.title: Manage Rooms - {branchName}
RoomManagementDialog.equipTip1: Press Enter after typing equipment name...
RoomManagementDialog.equipTip2: Type equipment name and press Enter...
RoomManagementDialog.descPlaceholder: General description of the room and its purpose...
RoomManagementDialog.emptyState: No rooms defined for this branch.

EventDetails.emptyProgram: No participants assigned to the program yet.

EventForm.title: Event Details
EventForm.description: Fill out the basic details of the event. You can add participants and manage the program after creation.
EventForm.namePlaceholder: e.g., End of Year Recital - Strings

errors.nameShort: Event name must contain at least 5 characters.

SickLeaveModal.title: Report Absence / Sick Leave
SickLeaveModal.description: Select the date range you will be unavailable. All scheduled lessons in these dates will be cancelled automatically.
SickLeaveModal.noLessonsToCancel: No lessons found to cancel in this date range.
SickLeaveModal.attentionDesc: This action will cancel all {count} lessons listed above. Students will be notified and given a makeup credit. This action cannot be undone.

AnnouncementComposer.title: Create Announcement
AnnouncementComposer.description: Fill in the details of the message you want to send.

placeholders.title: e.g., Reminder about Hanukkah break
placeholders.body: Write the announcement content here... Basic Markdown syntax is supported.

AnnouncementComposer.successDesc: The message "{title}" has been sent to the selected audience.

errors.titleMin: Title must contain at least 5 characters.
errors.bodyMin: Message body must contain at least 10 characters.
errors.minOneChannel: Must select at least one distribution channel.

AnnouncementComposer.noPermission: You do not have permission to perform this action.

CoordinatorInvite.title: You're Invited!
CoordinatorInvite.subtitle: Invitation code: {token}
CoordinatorInvite.cardDesc: You have been granted administrative access for your school's music program.
CoordinatorInvite.capabilitiesTitle: What you'll be able to do:
CoordinatorInvite.cap2: View teacher schedules and room assignments
CoordinatorInvite.welcomeDesc: Invitation accepted. Let's set up your school dashboard.

SuggestionButton.successDesc: We generated recommendations based on your content.
SuggestionButton.noSuggestionsDesc: No additional suggestions were found for this field.
SuggestionButton.errorDesc: Please try again in a moment.

validation.nameMin: Name must contain at least 2 characters.
validation.bioMax: Bio can contain up to 500 characters.

toasts.translatingDesc: AI is updating your bio in additional languages.
